meta_title: Privacy Policy | NextGen Floor Solutions Thailand
meta_description: Privacy Policy for NextGen Floor Solutions Thailand. Learn how we collect, use, and protect your personal data in compliance with Thailand's PDPA.
hero_description: How we collect, use, and protect your personal information
intro: NextGen Floor Solutions Thailand ("we", "us", or "our") is committed to protecting your personal data in accordance with Thailand's Personal Data Protection Act B.E. 2562 (2019) ("PDPA"). This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and protect your information when you visit our website or use our services.
section1_content: NextGen Floor Solutions Thailand is the data controller responsible for your personal data. You can contact us regarding any data protection matters at:
section1_address: 999/4 Moo 12, Nong Prue, BangLamung, Chonburi 20150, Thailand
section2_intro: We collect personal data that you voluntarily provide to us when you:
section2_item1: Fill out our contact or quote request form
section2_item2: Send us an email or message via WhatsApp or LINE
section2_type1: Name and contact details (email address, phone number)
section2_type4: Photographs of floors or facilities you upload
section2_type5: Technical data such as browser type, IP address, and pages visited (collected automatically via cookies and analytics)
section3_intro: We use your personal data for the following purposes:
section3_item1: To respond to your inquiries and provide quotes for our floor restoration services
section3_item2: To assess project requirements based on information and photos you provide
section3_item3: To communicate with you about our services, including follow-ups and scheduling
section3_item4: To improve our website, services, and customer experience
section3_item5: To comply with legal obligations under Thai law
section3_basis: Legal basis: We process your data based on your consent (provided when you submit our contact form), legitimate business interests, and legal obligations.
section4_intro: We do not sell your personal data. We may share your information with:
section4_item1: Service providers who assist us with website hosting (Cloudflare), email services, and business operations
section4_item2: Our technology partner Dr. Schutz (Germany) when technical consultation is required for your project
section4_item3: Government authorities when required by Thai law or regulation
section4_transfer: International transfers: Some of our service providers operate outside Thailand. When your data is transferred internationally, we ensure appropriate safeguards are in place as required by the PDPA.
section5_content: We retain your personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes for which it was collected, typically for a period of 3 years after your last interaction with us. Project photos and assessment data are retained for 5 years for warranty and reference purposes. After these periods, your data is securely deleted or anonymized.
section6_intro: Under Thailand's PDPA, you have the following rights:
section6_right1: Right to access — Request a copy of the personal data we hold about you
section6_right2: Right to correction — Request that we correct any inaccurate or incomplete data
section6_right3: Right to deletion — Request that we delete your personal data, subject to legal obligations
section6_right4: Right to restriction — Request that we limit how we use your data
section6_right5: Right to data portability — Request your data in a structured, commonly used format
section6_right6: Right to object — Object to certain types of data processing
section6_right7: Right to withdraw consent — Withdraw your consent at any time without affecting prior processing
section6_exercise: To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at sales@nextgenfloors.co.th. We will respond to your request within 30 days.
section7_content: Our website uses essential cookies required for the site to function properly, including locale preferences. We do not currently use advertising or third-party tracking cookies. Our website is hosted on Cloudflare, which may collect basic analytics data such as page views and visitor geography.
section8_content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data, including HTTPS encryption for all data transmission, secure cloud hosting via Cloudflare, and access controls limiting data access to authorized personnel only.
section9_content: Our services are intended for businesses and professionals. We do not knowingly collect personal data from individuals under the age of 20 without parental consent, as required by the PDPA.
section10_content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.
section11_content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or wish to exercise your data protection rights, please contact us:
